description: Gujarat Vidyapith is a deemed university in Ahmedabad, India, founded by Mahatma Gandhi in 1920. Its website provides institutional, academic, admissions, and student information.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for gujaratvidyapith.org; the site appears to be an informational university website with a student ERP login but no documented APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP server, or CLI for third-party developers.
